calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Title To Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alan Titus for and with Jeffrey Green.

Mr. Titus stated that they have a 2005 trust document signed by the Husband and the Wife, that schedule A was attached to the trust, that the Wife inherited from her Mother a 40% interest in a building in the Marina, and that one year later the Mother died and she inherited the remaining interest in the property. Mr. Titus also stated that a new schedule was prepared and the Wife put it with the trust, that they improved the property with community assets in an amount in the upper $300,000.00, that community property was used to improve the inherited property, and that it does not affect distribution, but it affects their ability to sell the property. The Petition for Order Confirming Title to Trust Assets is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Title To Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Continued To Jun-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
